body: I pre-ordered Nora Clement's autumn novel back in December. Do you have a shipping date yet?
The title is confirmed for late October delivery. We will email you as soon as your copy arrives.
Perfect, thank you for the quick reply.
I received the wrong book - I ordered the Kowalska novel but got something else entirely.
So sorry for the mix-up. Please return the book at your convenience and we will send the correct title with free shipping.
Done, I brought it in today. Thank you for sorting this out.
I am a UU literature student - is there a student discount on shop orders?
Yes, we offer 10% for students with a valid UU card, both in store and online. Just mention it at checkout.
My Tomas Bernhard order was due last week and still has not arrived. Can you check?
I have checked with Bokrondellen - there is a short delay on the Albatross Verlag shipment. Expected within the week.
Do you have the first Anders Lilja novel, Vinterdans, in stock?
We have two copies on the shelf right now. We can hold one for you if you let us know.
Could you gift wrap the book? It is for a birthday.
Of course - we include complimentary gift wrapping. Just add a note at checkout or mention it when you collect.
I ordered through the website yesterday and never got a confirmation email.
I can see your order came through fine. The confirmation email went to spam - we have resent it now.
I have a ticket to the February 26 event - can my partner join without a ticket?
Tickets are per person and the event is nearly full. Your partner would need one - there are two left on the website.
Do you have the latest Houellebecq in French on the shelf?
We have Anéantir on the French shelf. If you want the very latest it is on order and should arrive in two weeks.
Our reading group needs eight copies of the same title. Do you offer group pricing?
For groups of 6 or more we offer 15% off. I will send a quote by email - which title does your group have in mind?
The title I pre-ordered was cancelled by the publisher. When will my deposit come back?
Your deposit will be refunded to the original payment method within 5 working days. Apologies for the inconvenience.
Are you open the week between Christmas and New Year?
We are closed Juldagen and Nyårsdagen, open normal hours the rest of the week.
The order form on your website keeps failing on submit. I am using Firefox on Windows 10.
Thanks for the report - we found a Firefox compatibility issue and it has been patched. Please try again now.
Do you have any signed copies of Sofia Nyman's latest book? It is for a birthday gift.
We have two signed copies of Tidvattnet left from her launch event. I can put one aside for you until Saturday.
My order arrived today but one of the two books I ordered is missing from the parcel.
I am sorry about that - which title is missing? I will check stock and get it out to you by tomorrow.
The newsletter signup on your website gives an error every time I try.
Fixed now - a form validation error was blocking signups. You should be able to register without issue.
Uppsala stadsbibliotek would like to order 10 copies of a title for a programme. Who do I contact?
Please email orders@weaverandbook.se with the title and ISBN. We offer 20% on institutional orders of 10 or more.
A friend mentioned you have a loyalty card for regulars. How do I get one?
Just ask at the till - we hand them out in store. Every 10 purchases earns a 10% discount on your next order.
Can I get a proper invoice for my last order? I need it for work expenses.
I have emailed a VAT invoice to sofia.nyman.author@gmail.com just now. Let me know if you need anything adjusted.
I bought a poetry collection last week but I already own it. Can I return it or exchange for another title?
Yes - we accept returns within 30 days with receipt, unused. Come in and we can exchange for any title of equal value.
